MODULE: cosmos.integration.channels.matrix_channel
FILE: cosmos/integration/channels/matrix_channel.py (582 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Matrix Channel Adapter
==================================

Matrix protocol integration for the Cosmos swarm.

Features:
- End-to-end encryption (Olm/Megolm)
- Federated rooms
- Spaces and room hierarchies
- Reactions and threading
- Rich media
- Voice/video call signaling
- Bridges to other n

CLASSES:
- MatrixChannel(BaseChannel): Matrix protocol channel adapter.

Supports:
- Direct messages (1:1 rooms)
- Grou
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, room_id: str, text: str, media_path: Optional[str]=None, reply_to: Opti
  Methods: async def send_reaction(self, room_id: str, event_id: str, emoji: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def create_room(self, name: str, topic: str=None, invite: List[str]=None, is_direct: bool=Fals
  Methods: async def join_room(self, room_id_or_alias: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def leave_room(self, room_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def get_room_members(self, room_id: str) -> List[Dict]
